name: Grilled South of the Border Steak
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Beef round steak, 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Score each side of the meat 1/8 inch deep in a diamond pattern.
2. Prepare the instant meat marinade as directed on the envelope, stirring in catsup, Worcestershire sauce, and red pepper sauce.
3. Marinate the meat according to the directions on the envelope.
4. Remove the meat from the marinade; set aside the marinade.
5. Heat the beans in a foil pan for 15 to 20 minutes over the side of the grill.
6. About 5 minutes before serving, sprinkle cheese over the beans.
7. Place the meat on the grill, 2 inches from hot coals. Cook for 5 minutes on each side, brushing frequently with the reserved marinade.
8. Cut the steak into serving pieces; serve with spoonfuls of beans, chili peppers, and potato chips. Makes 6 servings.
